name: The Ultra-Realistic AI Avatar Kit (200+ Prompts for Virtual Influencer)
summary: You get instant access to my Private Notion Dashboard containing 200+ Copy-Paste Prompts. Works with Nano Banana Pro/Gemini, Seedream, FLUX, and other major AI tools.
text:
🔥 CREATE ULTRA-REALISTIC AI MODELS THAT PEOPLE THINK ARE REAL

My virtual models get DMs from real people every single day.

"Hey beautiful, where are you from?"

"Love your style! Are you single?"They think it's a real person. They don't realize it's AI.

That's the power of ultra-realistic prompts. If you are tired of AI images that look plastic, fake, or "too perfect," this collection is for you.

📦 WHAT YOU GET INSIDE

You get instant access to my Private Notion Dashboard containing 200+ Copy-Paste Prompts.

Works with Nano Banana Pro/Gemini, Seedream, FLUX, and other major AI tools.

📸 200+ Prompts Organized by Category:

  • 15 Mythical creatures Prompts: Different fictional characters like orks, elfs etc.
  • 25 Selfie Prompts: Mirror selfies, candid snaps, "woke up like this" vibes.
  • 25 Indoor Prompts: Cozy home shots, atmospheric cafés, restaurants.
  • 25 Outdoor Prompts: City streets, nature walks, golden hour lighting.
  • 25 Sport & Fitness: Gym workouts, yoga, running, activewear.
  • 30 Vacation & Travel: Beach days, pool side, resort life.
  • 15 In-Car Content: The classic "passenger princess" or driving shots.
  • 25 Details & Extras: Food, coffee, textures, close-ups (essential for realism).

🎁 INCLUDED BONUSES (Free Today)

✅ Bonus #1: 90-Day "Viral Growth" Blueprint 🚀

A complete content calendar. I tell you exactly what to post for 3 months to grow your account from zero.

✅ Bonus #2: The Phone Case Strategy 📱

My secret "authenticity hack." Learn why this one detail makes people trust your account instantly.

✅ Bonus #3: Realism Secrets Guide

Learn the exact keywords for skin texture, imperfections, and lighting that eliminate the "AI look."

✨ WHY REALISM MATTERS

Generic AI Prompts → Obviously fake → People scroll past.

These Prompts → Natural skin texture, bad lighting, mobile aesthetic → People think it's real → They engage, follow, and DM.

The difference = Everything.

👤 PERFECT FOR:

✅ Beginners (No complex coding or AI knowledge needed)

✅ Content Creators (Build a virtual influencer without showing your face)

✅ Marketers (Create consistent models for brand campaigns)

✅ Anyone tired of paying for stock photos or following other people's models.

🚀 STOP FOLLOWING. START CREATING.

You've already spent more time thinking about this than it takes to generate your first viral image.Think about it:

❌ A month of Netflix/Spotify subscriptions takes money out of your pocket.

✅ This skill puts money into your pocket.

Click "I want this" below to get instant access to the Notion Dashboard.

P.S. — Real testimonial: "Someone reported my AI model thinking it was catfishing. That's how realistic these prompts are. (Account got reinstated btw 😂)"
